topic: Gem Team adoption matrix: study the external multi-agent framework mubaidr/gem-team (external/gem-team-main) and triage its mechanisms against this repo's spec-kit system. For each Gem Team feature emit ADOPT / ADAPT / REJECT with file:line evidence on BOTH sides plus an explicit 'spec-kit already does this' dedup pass. Mechanisms in scope: orchestration & wave execution, orchestrator-owned memory tool, progressive context envelope, knowledge layers (PRD/AGENTS/Memory/Skills/Derived), verification & quality gates (zero-hallucination reviewer + critic + contract-first + TDD), diagnose-then-fix enforcement, auto-skills extraction, task classification + fast-path modes (MICRO/FAST_TRACK), token-efficiency, pre-mortem/risk/resilience, standard output contract, CHANGELOG-mined design decisions, APM distribution. Produce research.md (verdict matrix) and sub-packet-proposals.md (candidate new 027 child phases). Research-only; no source modifications. XCE corpus is exhausted (per 005 synthesis) so this is net-new external signal.

reducer.note: Orchestrator-maintained (hand-driven). Artifacts are kept in reduce-state.cjs-compatible format (7 ANCHOR sections in strategy.md) but the reducer is intentionally NOT invoked, to avoid the asset-template/reducer drift and path-resolution failure modes in this orchestrator-driven read-only-dispatch loop.

executionNote: Exhaustive depth (operator-selected). 13 analysis angles (iters 001-013) + adversarial-verify round + completeness critic + synthesis. Parallel fan-out in batches of ~5 via independent background `opencode run` processes (true concurrency, not fanout-run.cjs).
